Refusing this solo activity reinforces my commitment to the group's collective success and protects my sleep schedule, which is critical for maintaining my focus on deep relationship work.

desires: Secure a genuine, reciprocal connection with hallmate before the day ends to validate my high investment in relationships over solitary leisure.

args.content: I need to renegotiate our evening boundaries immediately. I am protecting my meal time with cohort_3 tonight, so I cannot be disturbed after 5 PM. Please respect this limit for the sake of our relationship and my schedule.
